def positive_string_forward_reference_in_annotation_not_under_type_checking_guard():
    rule_id = "string_forward_reference_in_annotation_not_under_type_checking_guard"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "String forward reference annotation not placed under `if TYPE_CHECKING:`, causing import at runtime."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
